sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72919" key="o)lbonome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλβο-νομέω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βίον,</foreign> <sense id="n72919.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">live a prosperous life,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2583.tlg001:581" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">581</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
